name: llm-skill-merchant
description: mux's personal cross-machine skill marketplace: role-scoped plugins for human-AI research collaboration.

plugins.name: human-ai-code-agent-kit
plugins.description: AI Code Agent side of the human-AI research collaboration model <suit-for-code-agent>: doc-contract-driven skills for experiment lifecycle (exp), evaluation (eval), compute operations (ops), and implementation workflow (impl).

plugins.name: human-ai-research-assistant-kit
plugins.description: AI Research Assistant side of the human-AI research collaboration model <suit-for-ai-research-assistant>: seven-mode kit for research discussion (sparring), research logs (incl. braindump-to-log protocol), decision notes, code-agent tasks, technical references, literature survey fan-out, and academic presentation writing.

plugins.name: multi-agent-discussion
plugins.description: Multi-Agent Discussion Protocol <suit-for-ai-research-assistant>: file-based structured debate between multiple AI agents and the human, converging into final.md under the human's arbitration.
